airbnb.badge: Take advantage of the Homestage offer
airbnb.label: For the first 10 property owners
airbnb.title: From €7,500, your apartment is ready.
airbnb.subtitle: Our turnkey offer is built for owners who want to launch a high-performing Airbnb apartment fast — without losing months to renovations, sourcing, and coordination.
airbnb.approach_p1: Homestage works with owners and investors in Marrakech to fit out apartments for short-term rental on Airbnb.
airbnb.approach_p2: We provide interior design, furnishing, rental optimisation and homestaging to maximise returns on property in Marrakech.
approach_items: and create a memorable experience for guests.
airbnb.process_title: From bare apartment to your first Airbnb booking
airbnb.s1_desc: Rental potential review and the right Airbnb positioning. Optional visits to our live projects in Marrakech.
airbnb.s2_desc: Tailored visual identity — boho chic, modern Moroccan, minimalist premium, artsy or resort. Moodboards and 3D before work starts.
airbnb.s3_desc: Paint, lighting, electrics, finishes, space planning and appliances. Photo and video updates in real time, even from abroad.
airbnb.s4_desc: Furniture, lighting, linens and décor for an elegant, memorable look built for Airbnb photos.
airbnb.s5_desc: Professional photography to maximise listing impact. Ready for your first guests and bookings.
airbnb.trust_note: 30+ properties launched on Airbnb · Trusted by owners in Morocco and abroad
